emailOnboarding.label: Setup Guide

panel.title: Setup Progress

sender.title: Sender
sender.helperReady: At least one sender email is verified.
sender.helperPending: Connect and verify the email address customers will see.

audience.title: Audience
audience.helperPending: Create or import the people you want to email.

draft.title: Email Draft
draft.helperReady: A draft or campaign already exists.
draft.helperPending: Write your first email campaign draft or use the draft helper to prepare a starter email.

compliance.title: Compliance
compliance.helperReady: Sender, audience, unsubscribe footer and suppression rules are ready.
compliance.helperPending: Check sender, audience, unsubscribe footer and suppression rules before sending.

send.title: Send / Schedule
send.helperReady: You can send a test, start or schedule a campaign.
send.helperPending: Unlocked after sender, audience, draft and compliance are ready.

newDraft.title: Start with a new draft
newDraft.description: Click Create Email Campaign to move into the draft workspace and prepare your first email campaign.

sender.title: Verify your sender
sender.description: Make sure at least one sender email is verified before sending campaigns.

audience.title: Choose your audience
audience.description: Select or import the email audience who should receive this campaign.

draft.title: Prepare your message
draft.description: Write or generate your email content before sending.

compliance.title: Check compliance
compliance.description: Confirm unsubscribe footer, sender identity and suppression rules.

send.title: Send or schedule
send.description: After all checks are ready, send now or schedule delivery.

helpers.objective: Choose the main goal of this email.
helpers.tone: Choose a writing style that fits your customers.
helpers.businessName: Enter the business, product, or campaign name.
helpers.ctaLabel: The button text your customer will click.
helpers.offerDetails: Enter promo details, end date, pricing, or other important message.
helpers.generateSimpleDraft: AI will help prepare a first draft based on the details on the left.

newDraft.title: Start with a new draft
newDraft.description: Click New Draft to start preparing a new email campaign. If you are new to this page, begin here first.

basicInfo.title: Fill in the basics
basicInfo.description: These details help the system produce a more accurate draft. Fill them based on the campaign you want to run.

objective.title: Choose the campaign goal
objective.description: For example promotion, follow-up, reminder, or announcement. Pick the option that best matches this email.

tone.title: Set the writing style
tone.description: Choose a tone that matches how you want to speak to your customers.

businessName.title: Enter business or product name
businessName.description: Add the business, product, or campaign name so the draft is clearer and easier to understand.

ctaLabel.title: Add a clear CTA
ctaLabel.description: This CTA is the short button text or instruction your customer will see and click later.

offerDetails.title: Enter the offer details
offerDetails.description: Include important information such as the promotion, price, end date, or product benefits so the draft feels complete.

generate.title: Generate the draft
generate.description: Once the information is complete, click this button to create the first draft. You can still edit it afterward.

editor.title: Review and edit
editor.description: Read through the subject and email content, adjust the wording if needed, and make sure the message is clear.

sendTest.title: Send a test email
sendTest.description: Before sending to customers, send a test to your own email so you can review the layout and message.

audience.title: Choose the audience
audience.description: Select the right customer list or segment for this campaign. Make sure the recipients are correct.

finalCheck.title: Final check
finalCheck.description: Make sure the sender is verified, the audience is correct, and the test email has been sent. Once the draft is saved and everything is ready, use the final action here to continue.

commandCenter.title: Understand your setup progress
commandCenter.description: Start here to see whether your sender, audience, draft and compliance checks are ready.

newDraft.title: Create your first draft
newDraft.description: Use the primary action here to move into the draft workspace and start your campaign.

draftFields.title: Fill in campaign details
draftFields.description: Set your objective, tone, business name, CTA and offer details before generating or editing the draft.

launchReadiness.title: Check launch readiness
launchReadiness.description: Review whether the draft, sender, audience and compliance checks are ready before sending.

list.title: Manage your audience
list.description: This area shows the reusable audience groups available for email campaigns.

import.title: Import recipients
import.description: Use these audience sources to upload or organize recipients before you draft a campaign.

quality.title: Check audience quality
quality.description: Review valid, invalid and duplicate counts so your send list is ready before launch.

list.title: Manage sender emails
list.description: Verified sender inventory is shown here so campaign operators know which senders are available.

add.title: Add sender
add.description: Open the setup workspace to add and verify at least one sender before launching a campaign.

status.title: Check verification status
status.description: Only verified sender emails can be used for campaign sending from this module.

library.title: Use message templates
library.description: Templates help you reuse campaign patterns for promotions, reminders, updates and follow-ups.

create.title: Create a template
create.description: Use these reusable template patterns as the starting point for governed campaign messaging.

summary.title: Read campaign performance
summary.description: Track delivery, pending, failures and other recipient outcomes from the selected campaign here.

history.title: Review campaign history
history.description: Use the recipient table to inspect results and compare what happened across campaign runs.

tab.title: Open the settings workspace
tab.description: This settings area groups suppression, compliance and history controls for email operations.

panel.title: Review the current settings page
panel.description: Use the current settings panel to inspect compliance state, suppression data or audit history.

action.title: Run the next settings action
action.description: Use the primary action here to update the current settings page, such as running checks or refreshing history.

guide.fallback: Guide target not found on this screen, so the guide is shown in a safe fallback position.

footer.description: A lightweight CRM dashboard to help Malaysian SMEs organize leads, customers, follow-ups and campaigns.

hero.title: Manage WhatsApp, customers and sales campaigns in one dashboard.
hero.subtitle: Rezeki Dashboard helps small businesses organize leads, follow up with customers, monitor sales and run campaigns more systematically.

pain.title: Common problems when your business depends only on WhatsApp

cards.title: Customer chats get mixed
cards.description: Business conversations can get buried among personal chats and old messages.

cards.title: Follow-ups are unclear
cards.description: It is hard to know which leads need attention today or this week.

cards.title: Contact names go missing
cards.description: Contacts can become unknown and make it difficult for the team to identify customers.

cards.title: Campaigns are manual
cards.description: Broadcasts and customer lists are handled one by one without clean records.

cards.title: Owners lack visibility
cards.description: Sales activity, performance and team access are not visible in one place.

cards.description: Control user, admin and super-admin access based on organization needs.

faqs.question: Is there a free trial?
faqs.answer: Contact us to check demo or trial options that fit your business.

faqs.question: Can I upgrade later?
faqs.answer: Yes. Packages can be reviewed as your team and usage grow.

faqs.question: Is a long contract required?
faqs.answer: The early packages are designed to make it easy to start. Final terms depend on organization needs.

faqs.question: Can multiple users use it?
faqs.answer: Yes. Growth and Pro are suitable for teams that need shared access.

faqPage.title: Frequently asked questions
faqPage.description: Short answers for business owners and sales teams who want to understand Rezeki Dashboard.

items.question: What is Rezeki Dashboard?
items.answer: Rezeki Dashboard is a SaaS CRM that helps SMEs manage customers, follow-ups, campaigns and reports in one dashboard.

items.question: What businesses is it suitable for?
items.answer: It is suitable for bundle shops, appointment services, property, food businesses, local services and small sales teams.

items.question: Do I need to install software?
items.answer: No. It runs in a modern browser and can be accessed through a web link.

items.question: Can I use it on a phone?
items.answer: Yes. The public site and dashboard are designed to be responsive on mobile and desktop screens.

items.question: Is customer data secure?
items.answer: The system is designed with user and organization-based access. Final security practice depends on production configuration.

items.question: Can multiple users use it?
items.answer: Yes. User, admin and super-admin structures are available for teams.

items.question: Can I run WhatsApp campaigns?
items.answer: Yes, Rezeki Dashboard supports campaign flows, audiences, templates and campaign history.

items.question: How is this different from normal WhatsApp?
items.answer: Normal WhatsApp is good for chat, while Rezeki Dashboard adds CRM, follow-ups, reports and team controls.

items.question: Is there a free trial?
items.answer: Contact us to check available demo or trial options.

items.question: How do I get support?
items.answer: Email admin@syedmohdhatta.my for demos, package questions or further help.

cta.title: Still have questions?
cta.description: Contact us and we will help suggest the next step.

contactPage.title: Contact Us
contactPage.description: Have questions about Rezeki Dashboard? Contact us for a quick demo or more information.
contactPage.responseNote: We will try to respond as soon as possible.
contactPage.audienceNote: SMEs, founders, business owners and sales teams.
contactPage.success: Thank you. Demo message received. Please connect the real contact endpoint later.
